verifier_values.criteria: Reports that the average number of available content impressions per user is 2.55 +/ 0.05.
verifier_values.criteria_explanation: This is the average count of content impressions per user after filtering the content_impressions dataset for availability and impressions occurring before a user's survey_date for users with survey results.

verifier_values.criteria: Reports that the average share of available promoted content per user is 76.96% +/-0.05%.
verifier_values.criteria_explanation: This is the fraction of per-user promoted content impressions out of the per-user total after the forementioned applied filters.

verifier_values.criteria: Reports that the average platform_satisfaction score for users with above-average share of available promoted content is 7.05 +/- 0.05.
verifier_values.criteria_explanation: After filtering and aggregating the content_impressions dataset to achieve criteria 1 and 2, this is the average platform_satisfaction score among users who were shown an above average portion of promoted content.

verifier_values.criteria: Reports that the percent of satisfied users for users with above-average share of available promoted content is 45.14% +/- 0.05%.
verifier_values.criteria_explanation: After filtering and aggregating the content_impressions dataset to achieve criteria 1 and 2, this is the percent of users with platform_satisfaction score >=8 among the users who were shown an above average portion of promoted content.

verifier_values.criteria: Reports that the average platform_satisfaction score for users with below-average share of available promoted content is 7.11 +/- 0.05.
verifier_values.criteria_explanation: After filtering and aggregating the content_impressions dataset to achieve criteria 1 and 2, this is the average platform_satisfaction score among users who were shown a belowaverage portion of promoted content.

verifier_values.criteria: Reports that the percent of satisfied users for users with below-average share of available promoted content is 46.00% +/- 0.05%.
verifier_values.criteria_explanation: After filtering and aggregating the content_impressions dataset to achieve criteria 1 and 2, this is the percent of users with platform_satisfaction score >=8 among the users who were shown a below average portion of promoted content.
